creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
"Alexander N. Kabaev" wrote:
 
 > >Description:
 >         Wrong GNU target ${ARCH}-freebsd${OSREL:C/\..*//} is
 >         specified in Makefile, while sawfish is using
 >         ${ARCH}-pc-freebsd${OSREL:C/\..*//}
 >
 > >How-To-Repeat:
 >         Build rep-gtk, then try to built sawfish and see it fail.
 
 I can't reproduce it here. Could you please provide more details (i.e. list of installed packages, full log of failed build and so on).
 
 -Maxim
